title: phymatosorus cuspidatus subsp. beddomei
intro: Phymatosorus cuspidatus subsp. beddomei, also known as the Beddome's climbing fern, is a type of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the Beddome's climbing fern include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
